onboarding.slide1_title:
Welcome to chauffly
Move With Confidence
onboarding.slide1_description: Enjoy premium rides, trusted chauffeurs, and a travel experience designed around comfort and safety.
onboarding.slide2_description: Choose from Go, Plus, Luxe, or Black — perfectly tailored rides for every moment, from everyday errands to executive travel.
onboarding.slide3_title: Your Security is Our Top Priority
onboarding.slide3_description: Verified drivers, real-time tracking, facial recognition, and instant sharing keep every trip secure.
